conditionDescription.FAIR: Fair condition with noticeable signs of use. There are some scratches and marks, but it still works fine.
conditionDescription.GOOD: In good condition, shows minimal signs of wear. No visible damage or defects. Functions like new.
conditionDescription.NEW: This item is brand new, never used, and still in the original packaging.
conditionDescription.POOR: In poor condition with major wear. There are cracks/scratches, and some parts may be damaged. Still functional but has noticeable flaws.
conditionDescription.LIKE_NEW: Like new, barely used, with no visible damage or signs of wear.

item.noLentItemsDescription: When you lend items to other users, they will appear here.

item.quickTransferExpiryDescription: The recipient must confirm receipt within 1 hour, or the transaction will be automatically cancelled.
item.faceToFaceStep1: A quick transaction will be created immediately
item.faceToFaceStep2: Hand over the item to the recipient in person
item.faceToFaceStep3: The recipient confirms receipt within 1 hour
item.faceToFaceStep4: The transaction is completed, and the recipient becomes the new holder
item.faceToFaceNotice: Make sure you are physically present with the recipient before creating this transaction.
item.transactionLocationNote: (Note: This location is set by the owner/holder for this transaction and may differ from the item's usual location.)
item.ownerWillBeNotified: Owner will be notified of your transaction request.
item.ownerAndHolderWillBeNotified: Owner and current holder will be notified of your transaction request.
item.hasRequested: You have already requested this item. The owner will review your request.
item.noExistingRequests: No existing requests for this item.
item.existingRequestsWarning: This item has {{count}} existing request(s). Approving a new request will cancel all other pending requests.
item.transferInstructions: Please arrange to hand over the item to the requestor at the agreed location.
item.available: This item is available for borrowing!
item.availableMessage: This item is available for borrowing!
item.availableDescription: You can contact the owner to borrow this item.
item.exchangeable: This item is available for exchange!
item.exchangeableMessage: This item is available for exchange!
item.exchangeableDescription: You can offer another item to exchange for this one (barter).
item.giftDescription: The owner is giving this item away for free.
item.conditionHelper: Select the option that best describes your item.
item.itemTransferred: Item has been transferred and is ready for you to receive.
item.receiveInstructions: After you click "Received", you will become the new holder of this item. The item's location will be updated to your address, and you will be responsible for:
item.responsibility1: Responding to future requests from other users
item.responsibility2: Handing the item to the next applicant when required
item.responsibility3: Returning the item to the owner upon request
item.confirmReceiptInstructions: Only click "Received" after you have actually received the item from the current holder.
item.alreadyRequested: You have already requested this item.
item.depositHelper: Required: Set a deposit amount to ensure the item's safety.

userProfile.locationNotFound: Could not find location for the address.

transactions.title: My Records
transactions.noActionsAvailable: No actions available for this record.
transactions.shareInstructions: Share this transaction link with the other party for face-to-face exchange. They can scan the QR code or use the link to view the transaction details.
transactions.receiptImagesDescription: Photos taken when the item was received, documenting its condition.
transactions.authRequiredMessage: To confirm receipt of this item, please sign in to your account or create a new one.
transactions.signInToConfirm: Please sign in or create an account to confirm receipt of this item.
transactions.ownerInstructionPending: You have received a request for this item. Please review the requestor's information and decide whether to approve or cancel this transaction.
transactions.ownerInstructionApproved: You have approved this transaction. Please arrange a meeting with the requestor at the exchange location shown below. Once you have handed over the item, click 'Mark as Transferred'.
transactions.ownerInstructionTransferred: You have marked the item as transferred. Waiting for the receiver to confirm receipt.
transactions.ownerInstructionCompleted: This transaction is complete. The item has been successfully transferred to the new holder.
transactions.ownerInstructionCancelled: This transaction has been cancelled. The item remains in your possession.
transactions.requestorInstructionPending: Your request has been submitted. Please wait for the owner to review and approve your request. You can cancel this request if needed.
transactions.requestorInstructionApproved: Your request has been approved! Please coordinate with the owner to meet at the exchange location shown below. Wait for the owner to hand over the item.
transactions.requestorInstructionTransferred: The item has been marked as transferred. Waiting for the designated receiver to confirm receipt.
transactions.requestorInstructionTransferredQuick: The item has been marked as transferred to you. Please inspect the item and take photos if needed, then click 'Confirm Received' to complete the transaction.
transactions.requestorInstructionCompleted: This transaction is complete. You are now the holder of this item and can manage it from your items page.
transactions.requestorInstructionCancelled: This transaction has been cancelled. You may submit a new request if still interested.
transactions.receiverInstructionTransferred: The item has been marked as transferred to you. Please inspect the item and take photos if needed, then click 'Confirm Received' to complete the transaction.
transactions.receiverInstructionCompleted: You have confirmed receipt of this item. You are now the holder and can manage it from your items page.
transactions.actionApproveDescription: Click this after reviewing the requestor's information and deciding to proceed with the exchange.
transactions.actionTransferDescription: Click this only AFTER you have physically handed over the item to the requestor at the exchange location.
transactions.actionReceiveDescription: Click this after inspecting the item's condition. You can optionally take photos to document the item's state at receipt.
transactions.actionCancelPendingDescription: Cancel this transaction request. The item will remain with the current holder.
transactions.actionCancelApprovedDescription: Cancel this approved transaction. Use this if you can no longer proceed with the exchange.
transactions.shareDescription: Share this transaction link with the other party for easy access and coordination.
transactions.faceToFaceDesc: Perfect for events, meetups, or quick lending. The holder initiates the transaction and shares it via QR code or link. The borrower (even if not a registered user) can quickly sign up and complete the exchange with a photo record. Must be completed within 1 hour.
transactions.feature2: Share via QR code or messaging apps (WhatsApp, Telegram, etc.)
transactions.directExchangeDesc: Meet at either the holder's or requestor's address. Both parties coordinate meeting time and location. Suitable for planned exchanges with 14-day completion window.
transactions.exchangePointDesc: Two-phase exchange using a trusted public location. Holder drops off item, then requestor picks it up at their convenience. Each phase has 14-day completion window.

faceToFace.title: Face-to-Face Quick Exchange
faceToFace.subtitle: (Perfect for events, meetups, or quick lending)
faceToFace.timeNote: ⏱ Must complete within 1 hour or transaction expires
faceToFace.useCase: 💡 Perfect for book clubs, meetups, events

directExchange.title: Direct Exchange at Agreed Location
directExchange.subtitle: (Both parties coordinate meeting for handover)
directExchange.negotiationDesc: Requestor cancels → New request → Owner approves
directExchange.step4Desc: 💬 Both discuss when/where to meet face-to-face
directExchange.returnNote: 🔄 Return: Owner requests from holder (auto-approved, same flow)
directExchange.timeNote: ⏱ Transaction expires after 14 days if not completed

exchangePoint.title: Exchange via Public Exchange Point
exchangePoint.subtitle: (Two separate transactions via trusted intermediary)
exchangePoint.backgroundNote: 💡 Use case: When parties can't find suitable time/place → Cancel direct exchange → Choose exchange point
exchangePoint.preferenceDesc: Users can select preferred exchange points. Others can search items by exchange point location.
exchangePoint.timeNote: ⏱ Each phase: Complete within 14 days or transaction expires
